title: Rasa Roadmap
note: Projected from the current docs/work/ledger.md backlog.

milestones.title: Metadata role normalization
milestones.summary: Analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for hints, return types, purity, docs, capability constraints, layout hints, and shape claims.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for hints, return types, purity, docs, capability constraints, layout hints, and shape claims.

storyDetails.title: Metadata role normalization
bullets: Acceptance: Analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for hints, return types, purity, docs, capability constraints, layout hints, and shape claims.

milestones.title: Structured fact authority
milestones.summary: Facts record evidence source, level, scope/dominance, assumptions, dependencies, and authorization; raw metadata does not authorize optimization.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Facts record evidence source, level, scope/dominance, assumptions, dependencies, and authorization; raw metadata does not authorize optimization.

storyDetails.title: Structured fact authority
bullets: Acceptance: Facts record evidence source, level, scope/dominance, assumptions, dependencies, and authorization; raw metadata does not authorize optimization.

milestones.title: ras explain and LSP artifact spine
milestones.summary: Users can see claimed, inferred, checked, unknown, disproved, fallback, and proof-loss evidence from the same artifact path.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Users can see claimed, inferred, checked, unknown, disproved, fallback, and proof-loss evidence from the same artifact path.
storySequence: ras explain and LSP artifact spine

storyDetails.title: ras explain and LSP artifact spine
bullets: Acceptance: Users can see claimed, inferred, checked, unknown, disproved, fallback, and proof-loss evidence from the same artifact path.

milestones.title: Function-level effect and capability inference
milestones.summary: Calls infer effects/capabilities bottom-up; opaque calls poison purity honestly; allow/deny constraints diagnose violations.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Calls infer effects/capabilities bottom-up; opaque calls poison purity honestly; allow/deny constraints diagnose violations.

storyDetails.title: Function-level effect and capability inference
bullets: Acceptance: Calls infer effects/capabilities bottom-up; opaque calls poison purity honestly; allow/deny constraints diagnose violations.

milestones.title: Checked-boundary guards
milestones.summary: Entry/return guards work for a tiny subset and establish scoped checked facts only after dominance.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Entry/return guards work for a tiny subset and establish scoped checked facts only after dominance.

storyDetails.title: Checked-boundary guards
bullets: Acceptance: Entry/return guards work for a tiny subset and establish scoped checked facts only after dominance.

milestones.title: Numeric MVP spec and proof
milestones.summary: Literal, i64, finite f64, equality/hash, arithmetic, constant folding, EDN/JSON, and WIT scalar policy are specified and tested before tensor work expands.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Literal, i64, finite f64, equality/hash, arithmetic, constant folding, EDN/JSON, and WIT scalar policy are specified and tested before tensor work expands.

storyDetails.title: Numeric MVP spec and proof
bullets: Acceptance: Literal, i64, finite f64, equality/hash, arithmetic, constant folding, EDN/JSON, and WIT scalar policy are specified and tested before tensor work expands.

milestones.title: Suspension boundary diagnostics
milestones.summary: may-suspend propagates through capability calls and unsupported suspension in pure/perf contexts gives a precise diagnostic.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: may-suspend propagates through capability calls and unsupported suspension in pure/perf contexts gives a precise diagnostic.

storyDetails.title: Suspension boundary diagnostics
bullets: Acceptance: may-suspend propagates through capability calls and unsupported suspension in pure/perf contexts gives a precise diagnostic.

milestones.title: Boundary movement and WMP inspection
milestones.summary: Plans expose movement mode, WMP profile, guard/fallback, and runtime-Wasm allocator path where relevant.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Plans expose movement mode, WMP profile, guard/fallback, and runtime-Wasm allocator path where relevant.

storyDetails.title: Boundary movement and WMP inspection
bullets: Acceptance: Plans expose movement mode, WMP profile, guard/fallback, and runtime-Wasm allocator path where relevant.

milestones.title: Tiny WIT projection from checked facts
milestones.summary: Generated WIT is no more precise than proven or checked facts; hinted-only facts require guard, dynamic encoding, or refusal.
requiredCapabilities: Acceptance: Generated WIT is no more precise than proven or checked facts; hinted-only facts require guard, dynamic encoding, or refusal.
storySequence: Tiny WIT projection from checked facts
